title: Sodium Dodecyl Sulfate PolyAcrylamide Gel Electrophoresis (SDS-PAGE) with Sypro straining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2tg5i","text":"This protocol provides an efficient way to observe proteins in samples. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"3mqta","text":"Prepare acrylamide gels a few hours before running the gels; acrylamide percentage depends on protein sizes. Prepare SDS-PAGE buffers beforehand as well. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"c27hb","text":"Acrylamide is carcinogenic and should be handled and disposed of accordingly to MSDS sheet and Health and Safety regulation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Load proteins with loading buffer (containing loading dye) in a 3:1 ratio in Eppendorf tubes, then boil samples for 5 min at 100°C. 00:05:00, Boiling

Load 20 µl of protein samples and a protein standard molecular weight marker in gels placed in a vertical gel tank system filled with 1x running buffer. Run gels at 100 volts for 2 hours at room temperature. undetermined, Protein samples 02:00:00, Running gels
After electrophoresis, immerse gels in a fixing solution bath for 30 min on a rotary shaker. (fixation 1/2) 00:30:00, Fixing solution bath
Immerse gels in 40 ml of pre-diluted SYPRO solution and incubate overnight, protected from the light on a rotary shaker at room temperature. undetermined, Pre-diluted SYPRO

Wash gels with a washing solution for 30 min on a rotary shaker at room temperature, in a container protecting gels from the light. 00:30:00, Wash with washing buffer Collect SYPRO solution in a specific container waste and follow MSDS and health and safety regulation to discard.

Immerse gels in ultrapure water and wash for 5 min at room temperature on a rotary shaker, in a container protecting gels from the light. (wash 1/2) 00:05:00, Wash with ultrapure water Collect washing buffer in a properly labeled container and follow health and safety regulation to discard.
Read gels under UV machine. Wear required protecting gear and discard gels in a acrylamide-specific container to be discarded following health and safety regulation.
Repeat the fixation one more time; immerse gels in a fixing solution bath for 30 min on a rotary shaker. (fixation 2/2) 00:30:00, Fixing solution bath

Immerse gels in ultrapure water and wash for 5 min at room temperature on a rotary shaker, in a container protecting gels from the light. (wash 2/2) 00:05:00, Wash with ultrapure water Collect washing buffer in a properly labeled container and follow health and safety regulation to discard.
creator: Kevin M Tyler
